metadata.name: launchpad
metadata.description: Solana token launchpad with bonding curve and presale modes

accounts.name: buyer_position
docs: Per-wallet position tracking for max buy enforcement (H-2 fix)

accounts.name: user_position
docs: User's position for this pool (init-if-needed for first contribution)

accounts.name: mint
docs: Token mint — creator must be mint authority initially

accounts.name: sol_vault
docs: SOL vault PDA holding native SOL lamports.

accounts.name: token_vault
docs: Token vault holding the token supply

accounts.name: mint
docs: Token mint — creator must be mint authority

accounts.name: buyback_sol_vault
docs: SOL vault PDA — validated in handler via PDA derivation

accounts.name: buyback_token_vault
docs: Program-owned token vault PDA for receiving swapped tokens.
Tokens land here, NOT in payer's wallet. This prevents theft.

accounts.name: meteora_pool
docs: FIX #2: Meteora pool — MUST match the pool recorded during migration

accounts.name: payer_wsol_account
docs: Payer's WSOL account for swap input

accounts.name: payer
docs: C-6: Only admin can trigger migration

accounts.name: buyback_token_vault
docs: Token vault for buyback — tokens land here during buyback, not in payer wallet

accounts.name: wsol_mint
docs: C-7: WSOL mint — validated to be the canonical native mint

accounts.name: token_mint
docs: H-4: Actual token mint (for Meteora pool creation + buyback vault init)

accounts.name: payer_wsol_account
docs: Payer's WSOL token account (for SOL deposit)

accounts.name: payer_token_account
docs: Payer's token B account (for token deposit)

accounts.name: payer
docs: Anyone can permissionlessly migrate once the target is reached.

accounts.name: buyback_token_vault
docs: Token vault for buyback — tokens land here during buyback

accounts.name: creator_wallet
docs: Creator wallet receives the creator SOL allocation.

accounts.name: token_mint
docs: H-4: Token mint for Meteora + buyback vault init

errors.name: ExceedsMaxBuy
errors.msg: Buy amount exceeds max 1% per wallet

errors.name: InvalidMinTokensOut
errors.msg: Minimum output must be greater than zero

errors.name: ZeroAmount
errors.msg: Amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: TargetReached
errors.msg: Presale target was reached, no refund

errors.name: InvalidMigrationTarget
errors.msg: Invalid migration target: must be 100-10000 SOL

errors.name: InvalidEndTime
errors.msg: Invalid end time: must be in the future

errors.name: AllRoundsExecuted
errors.msg: All scheduled buyback rounds already executed

errors.name: RoundNotDue
errors.msg: Next buyback round not yet due

errors.name: InvalidMintSuffix
errors.msg: Mint address must end with required launchpad suffix

errors.name: MintFreezable
errors.msg: Mint freeze authority must be revoked

errors.name: UnsafeMintAuthority
errors.msg: Mint authority must be revoked or program controlled

errors.name: AdminLpCustody
errors.msg: LP position cannot be custodied by admin

errors.name: NothingToClaim
errors.msg: Creator token allocation already fully claimed

fields.name: virtual_sol_reserves
docs: Virtual SOL reserves for price calculation

fields.name: virtual_token_reserves
docs: Virtual token reserves for price calculation

fields.name: initial_real_token_reserves
docs: Initial token supply loaded into vault

fields.name: migration_target
docs: SOL target for migration (lamports, default: 100 SOL)

fields.name: max_buy_bps
docs: Max buy percentage in basis points (100 = 1%)

fields.name: buyback_treasury
docs: Accumulated sell tax SOL for buyback treasury (lamports)

fields.name: is_migrated
docs: Pool has been migrated to Meteora

fields.name: round_number
docs: Round number after this execution (1-indexed). 0 for bonding pools.

fields.name: total_rounds
docs: Total scheduled rounds. 0 for bonding pools.

fields.name: meteora_pool
docs: Meteora DAMM pool created during migration — validated on every buyback

fields.name: lp_custody
docs: Program PDA that owns/custodies the LP position.

fields.name: position_nft_mint
docs: Meteora position NFT mint for the principal LP position.

fields.name: initial_treasury
docs: Initial treasury at migration time — used as the *fixed* base for
`bps_per_round` calculations so every round spends the same absolute
SOL regardless of remaining balance. Without this the 5th round
would spend 10% of what's left, not 10% of the original pool.

fields.name: last_buyback_slot
docs: Last slot a buyback was executed

fields.name: last_buyback_ts
docs: Last unix timestamp a buyback was executed (for presale interval gating)

fields.name: idle_tokens
docs: Explicit idle token accounting. Must remain zero for burn-only buybacks.

fields.name: creator_fee_bps
docs: Creator share of claimed LP fees in basis points.

fields.name: protocol_fee_bps
docs: Protocol share of claimed LP fees in basis points.

fields.name: keeper_fee_bps
docs: Keeper reward share of claimed LP fees in basis points.

fields.name: creator_token_allocation
docs: Creator token allocation claimable from the presale vault.

fields.name: total_rounds
docs: Total rounds configured (6 for Regular, 12 for Extreme; 0 for bonding)

fields.name: round_interval_seconds
docs: Seconds between rounds (14_400 or 1_800 for presale)

fields.name: virtual_sol_reserves
docs: Token name (for mint metadata, not stored on-chain in this program)

fields.name: presale_mode
docs: Post-migration buyback schedule mode (Regular or Extreme)

fields.name: mode
docs: Buyback mode: burn-only. Any other mode is invalid at decode time.

fields.name: presale_platform_fee_bps
docs: Presale buy fee in basis points (default: 100 = 1%)

fields.name: creator_fee_bps
docs: Creator share of claimed LP fees in basis points

fields.name: protocol_fee_bps
docs: Protocol share of claimed LP fees in basis points

fields.name: keeper_fee_bps
docs: Keeper reward share of claimed LP fees in basis points

fields.name: keeper_wallet
docs: Fixed protocol keeper wallet for LP fee harvesting and rewards

fields.name: pending_admin
docs: Pending admin for two-step transfer (Pubkey::default() = none)

fields.name: max_buy_bps
docs: Max contribution per wallet in basis points (100 = 1%)

fields.name: creator_pool_bps
docs: Creator pool percentage in basis points (2000 = 20%)

fields.name: presale_mode
docs: Buyback schedule mode — chosen at pool creation, immutable

fields.name: is_migrated
docs: Pool has been migrated to Meteora

fields.name: tokens_claimed
docs: Whether tokens have been claimed (presale only)

fields.name: refund_claimed
docs: Whether refund has been claimed (presale only)
